title: NZ Government Web Accessibility Standard 1.2
description: Mandatory standard requiring all NZ public service departments and Executive branch non-public service departments to conform their web pages to WCAG 2.2 Level AA, effective 17 March 2025. Includes specific exemptions and modified requirements for complex visual maps, audio-only/video-only content, captions, and audio descriptions.
